audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L425 (`auctionStart == 0 || elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration`) is the exact logical negation of the property assertion, so `bid()` proceeds only when `auctionStart != 0 AND elapsedTime <= auctionDuration`. `s_auctionStarts` is set only to `block.timestamp` (never a future value), preventing underflow at L423, and the reentrancy guard at L415-418 prevents mid-execution state changes.
